item.title: Love dump
item.description:
He threw himself on that grenade
That's hot
Congrats on the sex
I have to say, this is nice and all, but I was expecting a BJ at the end.
Voice of love beyond the grave
Care workers surprise 94 year old veteran with a pillow of his wife's face after seeing he slept next to her photograph; my dog would hump it - my luck.
Seredipity
Pizza party. Congrats on the sex - with extra cheese
Everybody loves blue
I'm not crying, you're crying
I need a jet pack dammit
I got some shit in my eye
I personally like cool sheets, but this is awesome
Plot twist: he's deaf
item.dc:creator: LosPer

item.title: Capitalism at its greatest! Willing to sell off our freedoms for a tax break. Maybe we rethink where we consume.
item.description: This is the part of the game where the monopoly board needs to go flying across the room and smashes against the wall in a beautiful ballet of wealth redistribution and reckoning. There is no winning scenario on the board left for us.

item.title: A very excited professor ready for treats!
item.description:
He was just so excited! We came in from playing fetch (or keep away - whatever)
He’s just the cutest!! We love some professor shenanigans! #thespottedprofessor #pvd #dogs #funny #treats. EDIT - thank you so much for the Pizza my heart accolade - extra treats for his beautiful, fluffy butt! EDIT 2 - thank you SOOO much for the accolades - so for those asking - professor is a Dalmatian Great Pyrenees mix. He’s a heft big boy and likes love, carrots and snacks of the like (no poultry tho, bc we’re allergic)!
item.dc:creator: katesmcgee

item.dc:creator: Othagovna

item.title: Crispy buffalo tofu bites recipe!
item.description:
https://www.triedandtruerecipe.com/vegan-buffalo-tofu-bites/ Sweet potato starch makes for really delicious, crispy tofu! If you don’t keep vegan, use traditional butter and honey instead!!! Sweet potato starch is used commonly in Taiwanese fried chicken (usually as a coating for the second fry IIRC)- I don’t know if it’s the higher moisture content but something about it gets bubbly and gooey and creates a really delicious, crispy exterior. I use it for frying alllll the time. So good! 1 pound extra-firm tofu (pressed and cut into 1-inch cubes) 1 teaspoon salt ⅓ cup sweet potato starch or use cornstarch 2 tablespoons neutral oil ½ cup Frank’s RedHot Hot Sauce or your preferred cayenne-based hot sauce. 2 tablespoons vegan butter (use dairy if you don’t keep vegan) 2 tablespoons vegan honey or maple syrup (more or less to taste, depending on heat preference) (use traditional honey if you don’t keep vegan) 2 scallions (trimmed and minced) Prepare the tofu: Place the cubed tofu in a large bowl and sprinkle with salt. Pour the sweet potato starch on top and gently coat it with the flour using a rubber spatula. Avoid breaking the tofu too much. You can also shake the bowl around to ensure the tofu is coated. Fry the tofu: Heat the neutral oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until very hot. Turn the heat to medium once the oil shimmers. Be sure to allow the oil to preheat for 5 minutes. Add the tofu in an even layer–frying in batches if needed–and cook without moving for 3–4 minutes per side. Turn only when the tofu releases easily from the bottom of the skillet. If your oil was nice and hot when you added the tofu, it shouldn’t stick. Cook until all the tofu is golden brown and crispy. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate. Prepare the sauce: While you wait for the oil to preheat, combine Frank’s RedHot Hot Sauce in a saucepan with vegan butter and honey. Turn the heat to medium-high and bring to a low boil. Remove from heat and set aside. Sauce the tofu bites: Transfer the tofu to a large bowl and pour the sauce on top. Toss gently to combine. To serve: Transfer the tofu bites to a large plate. Sprinkle with minced scallions, and enjoy!
I was really proud of how these turned out especially because the sweet potato starch held up really well to the sauce!! Next time I’m gonna try air frying them and see if the sweet potato starch gets as crispy in the air fryer as it does the skillet.
item.dc:creator: triedandtruerecipes

item.title: So this is actually growing now, important to point out the anti disability agenda of previous horrible dictators
item.description: It really feels like they’re trying to attack a very visual form of disability access as a way to be take rights from the disabled. Also this idiots claim of a “disability lobby”. The only way the ADA got passed was people pulling themselves up the stairs of the capital because there were no ramps. It shocked and upset enough people that they passed the ADA (which is still very loosely enforced). Another also, if captions are fine, then lets turn off the audio and see how accurate that captioning is in a real time emergency situation!
item.dc:creator: thespacewired

item.title: Curiosity Stargazing on Mars
item.description: I originally found it on Tumblr but that jackass had to put his phiz on the screen: https://www.tumblr.com/armengoldira/769084545108688896/the-night-sky-on-mars It originally came from TikTok, but I didn't like their music: https://www.tiktok.com/@nasa.curiosity/video/7439043095242493217 So I put my own on there (“Night Research” from Alexandre Desplat’s original score for *The Imitation Game*)
item.dc:creator: KalliJ

item.title: Linda Carter singing Rubber Band Man on The Muppets
item.description:
As clearly written in large letters at the beginning of the video and in the Insta watermark, her name is Lynda, not Linda. Which I thought was right but I second-guessed myself and totally shat the bed when I checked. Can't fix the title, so, apologies.
I saw this amazing video and wanted to share. Unrelated to The Muppets or the incomparable Lynda Carter, I also like to share about the D&D server of which I'm a member since the D&D posts always seem to have so many people saying they would love to try it out or get back into it. So, if you're either of those ... Have you ever wanted to try D&D but never found a good way to do it or have wanted a little more D&D in your life? I'm part of a great D&D Discord server that is safe, inclusive, and open to veterans and newbies alike. We have text-only games and voice games for all levels of character and player experience, mostly one-shots but some longer campaigns, as well. If you would like to check us out, the link is below. You can come and make whatever character you want, play in games, roleplay in our inn, or just chat out-of-character with likeminded people in a chill and accepting environment. https://discord.gg/forgotten-lands
item.dc:creator: adjacentengels

item.title: It's finally official
item.description: After months of training I finally passed my firefighter 1 test. I am so happy I decided to join up. I have such a wonderful team of fellow trainees and instructors. We all worked our butts off and all passed with flying colors.
item.dc:creator: Haloghost2

item.title: Backlogged memes: whatever have some memes
item.description:
No captions bc who cares
So apparently people on Imgur think it’s ok to use the r word, and when I tell them not to, downvote me to hell and call me it as if it’s not a slur. As a disabled person who’s already going through it, frankly I’m giving up. All the stupid socials are toxic and I’ve had it. I’ve just fucking had it. If you want to reach me then you’ll have a way. Otherwise I have no way of knowing who is part of the problem and who isn’t so I’m done trying to figure it out. Go be mean to each other and not to me.
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious
